creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks Russell.

Please include maintainer change in the existing review. There's no need for a separate Bugzilla issue to change maintainership for a port currently with no maintainer.

I also notice bug 229520, with my comment (bug 229520 comment 8) to the same effect. If the review mentioned here fixes that bug, the review should mention that fact in its SUMMARY with a PR: XXXX line, and adding the review URL to that bugs URL field.
